The following events took place in '''120 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] scouts arrive on [[Elom (planet)/Legends|Elom]], and first make contact with the [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]], who are industrialized but not yet spacefaring. After establishing trade and mining operations, the Elomin in turn encounter the subterranean [[Elom/Legends|Elom]], their fellow natives, for the first time.<ref name="New EGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
